mentions.note: CEO Ana Botín incredible; Cramer redoubling recommendation; terrific bank stock in strong regional banking cycle.
International bank alternative to Nubank; offered as superior option for those seeking international bank exposure.
Stock +142% YoY justified by scale and profitability focus; 180M customers, 8M adds in 2025; Webster deal targets 18% ROE by 2028; anyone selling making mistake.
Hold current positions; add on weakness if stock pulls back to 10–11 range—acquisition of Webster Financial strategic.
Caller's Deutsche Bank down from 39 to 28; Cramer recommends switching to Santander under CEO Ana Botín for European exposure on path to breakout. Better European play than DB.
Record-breaking quarter; acquisition of Webster Bank is excellent franchise asset; CEO wrote praising deal.
Had huge run last month (close to triple based on Cramer's prior recommendation). Stock paused to catch breath. Don't sell it. If comes back to 10, buy more. Strong pullback buyer.
Ana Botín leading brilliant acquisition of Webster Financial; exemplary M&A play under deregulation; Cramer points to as model for other large banks with AI tech to roll up rivals.
Diversified global bank up 200%+ since 2025 with best-in-class cost efficiency; Webster deal builds a ~$300B US bank and a path to 18%+ ROTE by 2028.
